theme: Báo cáo tiến độ với sếp

vocab.example: What's the status of the payment integration?
vocab.example_vi: Tình trạng của việc tích hợp thanh toán hiện giờ ra sao?

vocab.example: The login feature is one hundred percent complete.
vocab.example_vi: Tính năng đăng nhập đã hoàn thành một trăm phần trăm.

vocab.example: There is a small delay because of the API changes.
vocab.example_vi: Có một sự chậm trễ nhỏ do thay đổi API.

vocab.example: This task has a dependency on the design team.
vocab.example_vi: Task này phụ thuộc vào đội thiết kế.

vocab.example: We may need to adjust the timeline slightly.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta có thể cần điều chỉnh lịch trình một chút.

vocab.example: This feature is on hold until the client confirms the design.
vocab.example_vi: Tính năng này đang tạm dừng cho đến khi khách hàng xác nhận thiết kế.

vocab.example: We achieved our sprint goal this week.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đã đạt được mục tiêu sprint tuần này.

vocab.example: My only concern is the testing time before release.
vocab.example_vi: Mối lo ngại duy nhất của tôi là thời gian kiểm thử trước khi phát hành.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Nam, what's the status of the payment integration project?

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: We achieved our sprint goal — the core feature is complete.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Great. Any delay or concern I should know about?

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: There is a small delay because of a dependency on the design team.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: I see. Is the release date still safe?

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: We may need to adjust the timeline by two or three days.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: That's acceptable. What about the reporting feature?

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: That one is on hold until the client confirms the design.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Okay, please follow up with them this week.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Will do. I'll send an update by Friday.

questions.q: What did the team achieve this sprint?

options: A dependency on the design team

questions.q: What is the status of the reporting feature?

shadowing: What's the status of the payment integration project?
We achieved our sprint goal this week.
There is a small delay because of a dependency.
We may need to adjust the timeline slightly.
That feature is on hold until the client confirms the design.

interview.question: How do you communicate a delay to your manager?
tips_vi: Nhấn mạnh việc báo sớm, kèm nguyên nhân và giải pháp
Tránh chỉ đổ lỗi cho người khác hay yếu tố bên ngoài
Đưa ra mốc thời gian điều chỉnh cụ thể
interview.sample_answer: When I know a task will be delayed, I inform my manager as soon as possible, instead of waiting until the deadline. I explain the reason clearly, for example a dependency on another team, and I always bring a plan to fix it. I try to give a new realistic date, so my manager can adjust other plans if needed. I think being honest early is much better than surprising my manager with bad news at the last minute.

interview.question: Tell me about a project that achieved its goal despite some challenges.
tips_vi: Dùng STAR: nêu thử thách cụ thể và cách vượt qua
Nhấn mạnh tinh thần làm việc nhóm để đạt mục tiêu
Kết thúc bằng kết quả đo lường được
interview.sample_answer: In one project, we had a dependency on another team that caused a small delay at the start. Instead of waiting, I adjusted our internal plan and worked on tasks that didn't need their input yet. We also had a daily check-in to track our status closely. Even though we started late, we achieved our sprint goal by the end, because the whole team stayed flexible and communicated any concern early. This experience showed me that good planning can handle unexpected delays.
